scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:contract
scripts.db:migrate: uv run alembic -c services/api/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.lint: pnpm --recursive --if-present lint && uv run ruff check
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --recursive --if-present test && uv run pytest tests/unit
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --recursive --if-present typecheck && uv run mypy python services tests
